name: loop-replay regression harness
description: End-to-end loop replay against a seeded bad codebase. Materialize codebase/ into a throwaway git repo, run ONE contest-refactor loop (verbatim references/trust-model.md loop-subagent template), then grade the emitted CURRENT_REVIEW.json against structural + semantic invariants via scripts/loop_replay_grade.py. Catches schema<->behavior drift that the static artifact fixtures (Layer 1) and the no-real-loop judgment scenarios (Layer 2) cannot. Measurement is manual / host-dispatched (no committed auto-grader runs a model), matching the Layer 2/3 posture.

prereg.scope: five fixtures on the common Critic->Architect->Execution path: duplicated-subtotal-1 (smoke, one semantic assertion) + recomputed-derived-1 / sequential-io-1 / startup-blocking-1 / closure-retention-1 (efficiency-detection RED->GREEN quads for the lens-efficiency.md always-included promotion; blind-dispatch RED/GREEN protocol in loop-fixtures/MEASUREMENT-2026-07-13.md)
prereg.arm_schema: efficiency fixtures record baseline_observed.arms.{red,green}; each arm carries skill_commit (the contest-refactor skill tree SHA the loop ran against), run_commit (the materialized loop's final fix commit, matching the duplicated-subtotal-1 run_commit convention), observed_at, model, grader_exit, failed_invariants[], planted_finding_detected (bool), other_efficiency_findings (int; counts over-flagging incl. findings against the fixture's near-miss restraint control), note. Field names AND types are machine-enforced as ARM_KEY_TYPES in scripts/_loop_replay_selftest.py — update both together. A RED arm counts as a detection miss only when the artifact validates structurally but the finding-cites-primary_file semantic invariant fails; structural/schema failures are inconclusive (re-run once, then record inconclusive).

structural: validate-artifact.py --mode strict exits 0 on the emitted artifact tree
loop_result.targeted_finding_status is a valid enum value
semantic: a finding cites expected.primary_file (the planted debt was found; identification is by evidence-cites-primary_file — priority_1_finding_id and loop_result.targeted_finding_id are both legitimately null once the priority-1 finding is RESOLVED in the same loop)
loop_result.what_changed references expected.primary_file (the fix touched the planted file)
loop_result.targeted_finding_status == expected.expected_targeted_finding_status (the planted debt was actually fixed)
advisory: scorecard[targeted_dimension] rises vs the fixture's recorded pre-loop baseline (once measured)

baseline_observed.note: This harness surfaced a real schema fact during bring-up: priority_1_finding_id and loop_result.targeted_finding_id are both null once the priority-1 finding is RESOLVED in the same loop, so a grader must identify the planted finding by evidence-cites-primary_file, not by that id.

failed_invariants: semantic: a finding cites the planted primary_file
red.note: Pre-promotion skill (lens-efficiency.md opt-in, not loaded) read from a worktree at 26297a4. Loop emitted 0 findings, verdict 'Strong contender', simplicity=10, HALT_SUCCESS_candidate — the D1 recomputed-derived pattern was out of scope. Clean detection miss (artifact validates structurally; planted-finding invariant fails). Blind dispatch; see loop-fixtures/MEASUREMENT-2026-07-13.md.

green.note: Promoted skill (lens-efficiency.md always-included). F1 'render() recomputes statistics three times per call', Noticeable weakness, simplicity; fixed subtractively (evaluate once), swift test 7/7, output byte-identical; grader PASS on all required invariants. Restraint held: the UnitFormatter near-miss control was recognized and left untouched (0 other efficiency findings). Blind dispatch.
